system.description: Night-vision, keen hearing and smell, and echolocation: at combat or exploration speed the thief "sees" as if carrying a source shedding dim light in a 30' radius. Usable to fight and probe for traps; cannot discern colors, faces, markings, flat images, or writing. Does not function while charging or running, deafened, in bright light, or in magical darkness/silence. Opponents can hide from it (counts as dim light).
